{{Quote|Quit complaining, would you? Maybe it's a little dull, but it's nice to not have somebody shooting at us for once.|Jak, shortly before being killed by [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]]|<ref name="Empire 28">[[Empire 28|''Empire'' 28]]</ref>}}
'''Jak''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[TIE pilot]] who served the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
[[File:JakDeath.jpg|thumb|left|Jak's TIE is destroyed by the [[Slave I/Legends|''Slave I'']].]]

About seven months after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] Jak and his wingman were assigned to watch after the wreckage of the ''[[Anya Karu]]'', a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] that was destroyed several years before. He was really annoyed with his wingman who wouldn't stop complaining about their boring assignment, though Jak was quite pleased. He liked it much more than endlessly chasing the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] through the galaxy. The two pilots were waiting for the [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial Star Destroyer]] [[Liberator (Imperial I-class)|''Adjudicator'']] to pick them up, when a sudden blast destroyed Jak's [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighter]]. It was no one else than [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] who approached the crash site with his starship [[Slave I/Legends|''Slave I'']] to search the ''Anya Karu'' for a lost holorecording he would later deliver to [[Aron Harcourt]]. Before Jak's wingman could figure out what had happened, Fett blasted his TIE into pieces.
